languages.text: Владелец игнорирует негативный эффект (дебафф не накладывается) от {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} Погонщицы/The Drover.

traits.locale_text: Владелец игнорирует негативный эффект (дебафф не накладывается) от {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} Погонщицы/The Drover.

languages.text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.
languages.original_text: Владелец игнорирует негативный эффект (дебафф не накладывается) от {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} Погонщицы/The Drover.

traits.locale_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

languages.text: {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}圧制的な叫び{/g}の能力を使用すると、着用者は決意を失わず、{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}軍人{/g}の能力を使用できる。
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}圧制的な叫び{/g}の能力を使用すると、着用者は決意を失わず、{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}軍人{/g}の能力を使用できる。

languages.text: 使用{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}压迫尖啸{/g}能力时，装备者不会损失决心，并且仍然可以使用拥有的{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}军官{/g}能力。
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: 使用{g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}压迫尖啸{/g}能力时，装备者不会损失决心，并且仍然可以使用拥有的{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}军官{/g}能力。

languages.text: Takan kişi, {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Boğucu Çığlık{/g} kabiliyeti kullanıldığında kararlılık değeri kaybetmez ve varsa hâlâ {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Subay{/g} kabiliyetlerini kullanabilir.
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: Takan kişi, {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Boğucu Çığlık{/g} kabiliyeti kullanıldığında kararlılık değeri kaybetmez ve varsa hâlâ {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Subay{/g} kabiliyetlerini kullanabilir.

languages.text: Cuando se usa la capacidad {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Chillido angustioso{/g}, el portador no pierde firmeza y sigue pudiendo usar capacidades de {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}oficial{/g}, si las tiene.
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: Cuando se usa la capacidad {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Chillido angustioso{/g}, el portador no pierde firmeza y sigue pudiendo usar capacidades de {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}oficial{/g}, si las tiene.

languages.text: Lorsque la capacité {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Hurlement oppressant{/g} est utilisée, le porteur ne perd pas de Détermination et peut continuer à utiliser ses capacités d'{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}officier{/g} s'il en a.
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque la capacité {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Hurlement oppressant{/g} est utilisée, le porteur ne perd pas de Détermination et peut continuer à utiliser ses capacités d'{g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}officier{/g} s'il en a.

languages.text: Wird die Fähigkeit {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Beklemmender Schrei{/g} eingesetzt, verliert der Träger keine Entschlossenheit und kann weiterhin {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Offizier{/g}-Fähigkeiten einsetzen, sofern vorhanden.
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: Wird die Fähigkeit {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Beklemmender Schrei{/g} eingesetzt, verliert der Träger keine Entschlossenheit und kann weiterhin {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Offizier{/g}-Fähigkeiten einsetzen, sofern vorhanden.

languages.text: Когда применяется способность {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Подавляющий визг{/g}, персонаж не теряет решимость и возможность применять способности {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}офицера{/g} (при наличии).
languages.original_text: When the {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Oppressive Shriek{/g} ability is used, the wearer does not lose resolve and can still use {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}Officer{/g} abilities, if any.

traits.locale_text: Когда применяется способность {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Подавляющий визг{/g}, персонаж не теряет решимость и может применять способности {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}офицера{/g} (при наличии).

Когда применяется способность {g|f:ef7fcc36126f4f28a79482830aec55ae}Подавляющий визг{/g}, персонаж не теряет решимость и может применять способности {g|Encyclopedia:CareerLeaderGlossary}офицера{/g} (при наличии).
